commands.review_summary:
The PR removes room-event CLI session suppression in the direct and queued auto-reply runners and updates tests to expect existing CLI bindings and returned CLI binding metadata to be reused.

PR surface: Source -34, Tests +73. Total +39 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection shows current main suppresses CLI session reuse and returned session metadata for room-event direct runs, and the PR updates that behavior. I did not run a live CLI room-event scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human PR follow-up because the branch has a blocking session-state finding and the contributor still needs to provide real behavior proof; this should not be routed to automated repair while contributor proof is required.
